channel.title: Secondary Dev of LandStar on CHCNAV Develop
channel.description: Recent content in Secondary Dev of LandStar on CHCNAV Develop

item.title: Development based on broadcast messages
item.description:
Pre-preparation for receiving coordinates: Connect RTK satellite receiver, press power button to turn on satellite receiver, open LandStar software, confirm software is used under legal and registered premise, note that no project needs to be created or open existing project.

Connecting RTK #

The LandStar software connects to the data generation source through (Bluetooth/Wifi mode) or through a local connection. Switch to the configuration page, click the Connection menu or directly click the top to connect to the device navigation bar, and enter the Connected Instrument interface as shown below. Open the Bluetooth search target device, select it, and click the Connect button.

item.title: Development based on txt file
item.description:
Pre-preparation for receiving coordinates: Connect RTK satellite receiver, press power button to turn on satellite receiver, open LandStar software, confirm software is used under legal and registered premise, note that no project needs to be created or open existing project.

Connecting RTK #

The LandStar software connects to the data generation source through (Bluetooth/Wifi mode) or through a local connection. Switch to the configuration page, click the Connection menu or directly click the top to connect to the device navigation bar, and enter the Connected Instrument interface as shown below. Open the Bluetooth search target device, select it, and click the Connect button.
